mapper.select: SELECT inspection_type AS inspectionType, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN overall_result = 'pass' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passCount, SUM(CASE WHEN overall_result = 'fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failCount FROM quality_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY inspection_type

SELECT IFNULL(defect_type, '未填写') AS defectType, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM quality_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND defect_type IS NOT NULL AND defect_type != '' GROUP BY defect_type ORDER BY totalCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
